articles.description: Follow Premier League team news and news conferences live: Arne Slot, Eddie Howe and Andoni Iraola speaking.
articles.title: Premier League team news LIVE: Liverpool, Newcastle and Bournemouth news conferences

articles.description: Cadillac and Audi enter F1 with the ultimate goal of becoming world champions. Both know they have some way to go before achieving that aim.
articles.title: Cadillac and Audi enter F1: Two teams with the same ambition but very different projects

articles.description: Ruben Amorim's 14 months in charge of Manchester United have come at a price, with the club now paying up to £15.9m to sack him, in addition to £11m to hire the Portuguese.
articles.title: Ruben Amorim: Man Utd could end up paying £27m to have hired and fired Portuguese manager

articles.description: Italian golfer Andrea Pavan is seriously injured after falling multiple floors down an open lift shaft before this week's South African Open.
articles.title: Andrea Pavan seriously injured after falling down lift shaft before South African Open

articles.description: USA men's ice hockey player Brady Tkachuk distances himself from an AI-enhanced White House video in which he appears to disparage Canadians, saying "those words would never come out of my mouth".
articles.title: 2026 Winter Olympics: US player Brady Tkachuk on White House AI video

articles.description: Key players have gone, the manager is leaving and has criticised the club and upset fans - yet Crystal Palace's chaotic campaign could still end in European glory.
articles.title: 'Don't know what the fuss was about' - chaotic Palace season could end in glory

articles.description: After a forgettable seven months in charge at Hearts in 2017, Scottish manager Ian Cathro is rebuilding his reputation at Estoril.
articles.title: Ian Cathro: 'The most Portuguese Scot there is' rebuilding his managerial reputation

articles.description: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on Oli Fox from indie band Good Neighbours, plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.
articles.title: Premier League predictions: Chris Sutton v Oli Fox from Good Neighbours - and AI

articles.description: In his BBC Sport column, ex-Premier League boss Tony Pulis explains why it is so hard for football managers to keep their jobs in the modern game.
articles.title: Tony Pulis column: So much for the three-year plan - what is the secret to managerial longevity?

articles.description: Cristiano Ronaldo becomes part-owner of Spanish second division side Almeria after acquiring a 25% share in the Saudi Arabian-owned club.
articles.title: Cristiano Ronaldo buys 25% share in Spanish second division side Almeria
